claim: aPKCz causes tumour enhancement by affecting glutamine metabolism.
evidence_sentences: Interestingly, the loss of PKCζ in mice results in enhanced intestinal tumorigenesis and increased levels of these two metabolic enzymes, whereas patients with low levels of PKCζ have a poor prognosis.
Taken together, this demonstrates that PKCζ is a critical metabolic tumor suppressor in mouse and human cancer.

conditions: patients with low levels of PKCζ
